name: coinis
description: Coinis MCP skills: image and video creative generation, branded campaign launch on Meta, performance reports, async-job polling, and multi-product batches via the Coinis advertising platform.

interface.shortDescription: Generate ad creatives and launch Meta campaigns via the Coinis MCP
interface.longDescription: Coinis Skills turn Codex into an advertising production agent backed by the Coinis platform. Generate image and video ad creatives (UGC, image-to-video, avatar, talking-head) from product URLs, recreate competitor ads, run revisions, batch creatives across multiple products and formats, poll async render jobs, launch Meta campaigns end-to-end, and pull performance reports — all through the Coinis MCP server (https://mcp.coinis.com). Wraps the upstream in-MCP playbooks with CLI-specific surfacing rules; the MCP previews credit spend (preview_cost) before any paid fire.
defaultPrompt: Generate an ad image for this product URL
Create a 9:16 UGC video for this product
Launch a Meta campaign for these creatives
Show last week's ROAS by ad set
